posts.title: Designing a LuaAgent IDE on IDEA Community
posts.description: How to build a LuaAgent-focused IDE by reusing the open-source IntelliJ IDEA Community codebase, keeping the product fork thin, and putting language intelligence into a controlled plugin and runtime bridge.

posts.title: 基于 IDEA Community 二次开发 LuaAgent IDE 的设计思路
posts.description: 如何复用开源 IntelliJ IDEA Community 代码基座，保持产品 fork 足够薄，把 LuaAgent 的语言智能、运行时连接和安全边界放进受控插件与 Runtime Bridge。

posts.title: Module Partitioning Boundaries in Eva-CLI
posts.description: How Eva-CLI turns architecture decisions into Rust crate boundaries, dependency direction, runtime handoffs, and controlled side-effect ownership.

posts.title: Eva-CLI 的模块划分边界
posts.description: Eva-CLI 如何把架构决策落实为 Rust crate 边界、依赖方向、运行时交接和受控副作用归属。

posts.title: Thoughts on EvaLauncher as Eva's Mobile Client
posts.description: How EvaLauncher.com points toward a mobile Eva client built around presence, fast intent capture, runtime handoff, and explicit privacy boundaries.

posts.title: 关于 EvaLauncher 作为 Eva 移动客户端的思考
posts.description: 从 EvaLauncher.com 展示的 Android launcher 出发，思考 Eva 移动客户端应如何围绕陪伴感、快速意图捕获、运行时交接和明确隐私边界展开。

posts.title: Reflections on Eva-CLI Architecture and Harness Design
posts.description: How Eva-CLI can turn its Rust-governed runtime architecture into executable evidence through a narrow, deterministic harness layer.

posts.title: 关于 Eva-CLI 当前架构与 Harness 架构的思考
posts.description: Eva-CLI 如何通过窄而确定性的 Harness 层，把 Rust 托管 Runtime 架构转化为可执行证据。

posts.title: An AGI Runtime Implementation Path Based on Eva-CLI
posts.description: A detailed implementation path for turning Eva-CLI's Rust runtime, Lua Agents, EventBus, memory, discovery, adapters, verification, and release snapshots into a controlled AGI-style runtime.

posts.title: 基于 Eva-CLI 实现 AGI Runtime 的实现思路
posts.description: 如何把 Eva-CLI 当前的 Rust Runtime、Lua Agent、EventBus、记忆、发现、Adapter、验证和 Release Snapshot 组合成一个受控的 AGI 风格运行时。

posts.title: Self-Upgrading Agent System Design for Eva-CLI
posts.description: How Eva-CLI can combine Rust-owned runtime authority, Lua hot reload, memory, discovery, release snapshots, and process generation switching into a controlled self-upgrade loop.

posts.title: Eva-CLI 可自我升级 Agent 系统实现思路
posts.description: 如何把 Rust 托管运行时、Lua 热更新、记忆、发现、Release Snapshot 和进程 generation 切换组合成受控的自我升级闭环。

posts.title: Multi-Agent Memory Design
posts.description: An implementation sketch for per-Agent memory, project memory, and layered short-term, long-term, and important memory.

posts.title: 多 Agent 记忆设计实现思路
posts.description: 围绕每个 Agent 的独立记忆、项目总记忆，以及短期、长期、重要记忆分层的实现草案。

posts.title: Eva Runtime Notes
posts.description: Design notes about Eva-CLI runtime boundaries.

posts.title: Eva 运行时笔记
posts.description: 关于 Eva-CLI 运行时边界的设计笔记。

posts.title: Skill Implementation Boundary
posts.description: How Eva-CLI turns Skills into controlled workflow capabilities instead of raw script execution.

posts.title: Skill 实现边界
posts.description: Eva-CLI 如何把 Skill 收束为受控 workflow capability，而不是原始脚本执行入口。
